nasb.text: On the first day of the week, when we were gathered together to break bread, Paul began talking to them, intending to leave the next day, and he prolonged his message until midnight.

esv.text: On the first day of the week, when we were gathered together to break bread, Paul talked with them, intending to depart on the next day, and he prolonged his speech until midnight.

cnv.text: 禮拜日，我們聚會擘餅的時候，保羅對大家講道，他因第二天就要起行，就一直講到半夜。

ccb.text: 七日的第一日，我们聚会掰饼，保罗因为次日要离开，就向他们讲道，直到深夜。

csbs.text: 在一周的头一天，门徒们聚集掰饼的时候，保罗向他们讲论，因第二天就要离开，于是一直讲到半夜。
